mapper.select: SELECT PK pk, 구분 division, CONVERT(varchar, 년도, 23) year, 임금_최소 minWage, 임금_최대 maxWage, 성공금 successFee FROM J_참여자관리_기준금액 ORDER BY PK DESC
SELECT PK pk, 구분 division, CONVERT(varchar, 년도, 23) year, 임금_최소 minWage, 임금_최대 maxWage, 성공금 successFee FROM J_참여자관리_기준금액 WHERE PK = #{pk}
mapper.update: UPDATE J_참여자관리_기준금액 SET 구분 = #{division}, 년도 = #{year}, 임금_최소 = #{minWage}, 임금_최대 = #{maxWage}, 성공금 = #{successFee} WHERE PK = #{pk}
mapper.select: SELECT PK pk, 년도 betterYear, CONVERT(varchar, 년도DATE, 23) betterYearDate, 나은임금 betterWage, CONVERT(varchar, 등록일, 120) betterRegDate FROM J_참여자관리_나은기준임금 ORDER BY PK DESC
SELECT PK pk, 년도 betterYear, CONVERT(varchar, 년도DATE, 23) betterYearDate, 나은임금 betterWage, CONVERT(varchar, 등록일, 120) betterRegDate FROM J_참여자관리_나은기준임금 WHERE PK = #{pk}

SELECT PK pk, 지점 csvBranch, 작성자 csvWriterId, 행번호 rowNumber, 상담사ID counselorId, 참여자 csvParticipant, 참여유형 csvParticipationType, 성별 csvGender, 생년월일 csvBirthDate, 모집경로 csvRecruitPath, 경력유무 csvCareer, 학력 csvEducation, 특정계층여부 csvSpecificClass, 진행단계 csvProgressStage, 출장상담사 csvTravelCounselor, CONVERT(varchar, 등록일, 120) csvRegDate FROM J_참여자관리_배정CSV_히스토리 ORDER BY PK DESC

SELECT PK pk, 지점 formulaBranch, 작성자 formulaWriterId, 가중치로드 weightLoad, 가중치공정 weightProcess, 가중치연속 weightContinuous, 가중치페이스 weightPace, 갭임계값 gapThreshold, 일일제한 dailyLimit, G1제한 g1Limit, G2제한 g2Limit, G3제한 g3Limit, CONVERT(varchar, 등록일, 120) formulaRegDate FROM J_참여자관리_배정산정식_히스토리 ORDER BY PK DESC
SELECT 자격증번호 certificateNo, 구직번호 certJobNo, 자격증 certificateName FROM J_참여자관리_자격증 ORDER BY 자격증번호 DESC
SELECT 직업훈련번호 trainingNo, 구직번호 trainJobNo, 직업훈련 trainingName FROM J_참여자관리_직업훈련 ORDER BY 직업훈련번호 DESC

WITH fiscal_dates AS ( SELECT DATEFROMPARTS( CASE WHEN MONTH(GETDATE()) >= 11 THEN YEAR(GETDATE()) ELSE YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 END, 11, 1) AS start_date, DATEFROMPARTS( CASE WHEN MONTH(GETDATE()) >= 11 THEN YEAR(GETDATE()) + 1 ELSE YEAR(GETDATE()) END, 10, 31) AS end_date ), 실적 AS ( /* 회계연도 내 종료자/취업자 집계 */ SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN 진행단계 IN ('미고보/인력공급업','고보일반','등록창업','미등록창업','미취업사후관리','미취업사후종료','중단') AND NULLIF(CASE WHEN 취창업일 > '1900-01-01' THEN 취창업일 WHEN 기간만료일 > '1900-01-01' THEN 기간만료일 END, '1900-01-01') BETWEEN F.start_date AND F.end_date AND 기간만료일 >= F.start_date AND 지점 IN ('인천','성남','서부','남부','부천','수원','의정부','인천남부','동대문','광명','안양','북부','천호','관악') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fiscal_completed, SUM(CASE WHEN 진행단계 IN ('미고보/인력공급업','고보일반','등록창업','미등록창업','미취업사후관리','미취업사후종료','중단') AND NULLIF(CASE WHEN 취창업일 > '1900-01-01' THEN 취창업일 WHEN 기간만료일 > '1900-01-01' THEN 기간만료일 END, '1900-01-01') BETWEEN F.start_date AND F.end_date AND 기간만료일 >= F.start_date AND 지점 IN ('인천','성남','서부','남부','부천','수원','의정부','인천남부','동대문','광명','안양','북부','천호','관악') AND 취창업일 >= F.start_date AND (진행단계 IN ('등록창업','고보일반', '미취업사후종료', '중단') OR (진행단계 = '미고보/인력공급업' AND 취업유형 IN ('프리랜서', '특수고용') AND 임금 > 70)) AND (취업인센티브_구분 NOT LIKE '%파견%' OR 취업인센티브_구분 IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fiscal_employed FROM J_참여자관리 CROSS JOIN fiscal_dates F WHERE 지점 NOT IN ('테스트','공통') AND ISNULL(모집경로,'') <> '이관' AND ISNULL(참여유형,'') <> '이관' AND 진행단계 <> '취소' ) SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J_참여자관리) totalParticipants, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J_참여자관리 WHERE YEAR(등록일) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(등록일) = MONTH(GETDATE())) monthlyNewAssignments, CASE WHEN R.fiscal_completed = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE CAST(R.fiscal_employed AS FLOAT) / CAST(R.fiscal_completed AS FLOAT) * 100 END employmentRate, R.fiscal_employed, R.fiscal_completed FROM 실적 R

/* * 회계연도(11월~10월) 기준 지점별 취업/알선 성과 집계 * 취업_F 판정: 종료_F AND 취창업일 >= start AND 진행단계 취업 계열 AND 파견 아님 * 알선_F 판정: 취업_F AND 취업유형 IN ('알선','외부 알선') * 대상_F: 평가 대상 지점 AND 실제종료일 within fiscal year */ WITH fiscal_dates AS ( SELECT DATEFROMPARTS( CASE WHEN MONTH(GETDATE()) >= 11 THEN YEAR(GETDATE()) ELSE YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 END, 11, 1) AS start_date, DATEFROMPARTS( CASE WHEN MONTH(GETDATE()) >= 11 THEN YEAR(GETDATE()) + 1 ELSE YEAR(GETDATE()) END, 10, 31) AS end_date ), 기본_데이터_정규화 AS ( SELECT P.*, NULLIF(CASE WHEN 취창업일 > '1900-01-01' THEN 취창업일 WHEN 기간만료일 > '1900-01-01' THEN 기간만료일 ELSE NULL END, '1900-01-01') AS 실제종료일 FROM J_참여자관리 P WHERE 지점 NOT IN ('테스트','공통') AND ISNULL(모집경로,'') <> '이관' AND ISNULL(참여유형,'') <> '이관' AND 진행단계 <> '취소' ), 통합_참여자_분석 AS ( SELECT P.*, CASE WHEN (진행단계 IN ('미고보/인력공급업','고보일반','등록창업','미등록창업','미취업사후관리','미취업사후종료','중단') AND 실제종료일 BETWEEN F.start_date AND F.end_date AND 기간만료일 >= F.start_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS 종료_F, CASE WHEN 취창업일 >= F.start_date AND 진행단계 IN ('등록창업','고보일반','미취업사후종료','중단') AND (취업인센티브_구분 NOT LIKE '%파견%' OR 취업인센티브_구분 IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS 취업_F, CASE WHEN 취업유형 IN ('알선', '외부 알선') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS 알선_F, CASE WHEN 지점 IN ('인천','성남','서부','남부','부천','수원','의정부','인천남부','동대문','광명','안양','북부','천호','관악') AND 실제종료일 BETWEEN F.start_date AND F.end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS 대상_F FROM 기본_데이터_정규화 P CROSS JOIN fiscal_dates F ), branch_stats AS ( SELECT 지점, CAST(ROUND(SUM(CAST(종료_F AS FLOAT) * 대상_F), 0) AS INT) AS 종료자수, CAST(ROUND(SUM(CAST(종료_F AS FLOAT) * 취업_F * 대상_F), 0) AS INT) AS 취업자수, CAST(ROUND(SUM(CAST(종료_F AS FLOAT) * 알선_F * 취업_F * 대상_F), 0) AS INT) AS 알선취업자수 FROM 통합_참여자_분석 GROUP BY 지점 ) SELECT B.지점 AS branchLabel, ISNULL(S.취업자수, 0) AS employmentCount, ISNULL(S.알선취업자수, 0) AS placementCount, ISNULL(S.종료자수, 0) AS branchParticipantCount FROM J_참여자관리_지점 B LEFT JOIN branch_stats S ON S.지점 = B.지점 ORDER BY B.순서 ASC
